title: Melanthera lifuana
taxonomy: Melanthera lifuana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Pacific Islands. The classification of Melanthera lifuana is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Asterales. Melanthera lifuana's classification also includes the class Magnoliopsida, and the family Asteraceae. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other species.

parts: Melanthera lifuana, also known as Lifou melastome, is a plant species native to New Caledonia.
